transcript: Okay, LeBron, you used to be a good guy, and then you turned into a bad guy, and now you're a good guy again? And you left the NBA hanging, what are they going to do when they don't have a bad guy? Exactly what we do, they're going to make a new one.

timestamps.text: Okay, LeBron, you used to be a good guy, and then you turned into a bad guy, and now you're a good guy again?
And you left the NBA hanging, what are they going to do when they don't have a bad guy?
Exactly what we do, they're going to make a new one.
